summary: Comprehensive testing of FletchFlow Preventive Coverage Module completed. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested successfully including Preventive Services page with 63 codes across 7 categories, search functionality, analytics, and abuse detection. Plan Builder shows Preventive Design dropdown (ACA Strict/Enhanced). All existing pages continue to work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height calculation (-1 values)

passed_tests: ✅ API: Wellness Visit category has 14 services
✅ API: Cancer Screening category has 11 services
✅ API: GET /api/preventive/search?q=mammogram returns 2 cancer screening codes
✅ API: GET /api/preventive/analytics returns all utilization metrics
✅ UI: Preventive Services page loads with 63 codes, 7 categories
✅ UI: Preventive catalog tabs (Catalog, Analytics, Abuse Detection) visible
✅ UI: Expand Wellness Visit category shows 14 services
✅ UI: Expand Immunization category shows 15 services
✅ UI: Expand Cancer Screening category shows 11 services
✅ UI: Analytics tab shows Utilization Summary
✅ UI: Abuse Detection tab shows 'No abuse flags detected'
✅ UI: Plan Builder shows Preventive Design dropdown (ACA Strict/Enhanced)
✅ UI: Sidebar navigation shows Preventive link between Prior Auth and Network
✅ UI: Settings page shows 4 coverage lines (Medical, Dental, Vision, Hearing)
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts chart width/height warnings in console - consider adding explicit dimensions or ResponsiveContainer wrapper (LOW priority, does not affect functionality)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FletchFlow Preventive Coverage Module is fully functional. 63 preventive service codes across 7 categories (Wellness Visit: 14, Immunization: 15, Cancer Screening: 11, Preventive Screening: 5, Women's Preventive: 8, Pediatric Preventive: 4, Behavioral Counseling: 6). Preventive adjudication engine intercepts service lines BEFORE normal benefit processing - if CPT matches preventive DB + Z-code diagnosis + within frequency = $0 member cost. Plan Builder has Preventive Design dropdown (ACA Strict/Enhanced). All existing features (Dashboard, Claims, Plans, Members, Prior Auth, Network, Code Database, Settings) continue to work correctly.
